summary: Linked Review Queue Evidence Attached to a scoped evidenceStatus=attached filter with URL state.
repoEvidence: The route already computed scoped queue row evidence_count and summary.evidenceAttached.
The workspace rendered Evidence Attached as summary-only.
Review Queue URL cleanup previously treated evidenceStatus as unsupported.
changes: Added canonical evidenceStatus=attached parsing and evidence_count > 0 filtering to /api/site/review-queue.
Added an Evidence Attached metric action, filter select, active-filter chip, URL parsing, and URL sync in workspace.js.
Updated dashboard, navigation, and review-queue deeplink verifiers for the supported evidence-attached preset.
Added focused route and workspace tests for the scoped evidence-attached filter.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor, or student visibility boundaries changed.
The filter uses the existing authorized Review Queue scope and only filters rows already visible to the caller.
No evidence bodies, storage identifiers, staff-only notes, mutations, migrations, secrets, deploys, or live data changed.
finalValidation: JSON parse for automation/state/functionality-ux-growth-state.json and this manifest
nextRecommended: Run hosted section-level permission proof when credentialed runtime is available.
Inspect Review Queue missing-evidence semantics before adding any new queue filter.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add evidence-attached-review unless regression removes the preset, route filter, or URL proof.
